note: OW05 Urayasu harbour complex -> LAND (owner design rule 2026-07-15: 'a harbour we decided not to resolve should be treated as land; then the north and south sides are under equal conditions and the corridor can be centred on the real channel axis'). Covers the wall, the basin and its sub-resolution entrance. Applied BEFORE edit_005 (filename order), so the axis-centred carve then takes its northern half from this block symmetrically -- resolving the contradiction of ceding land only on the south.
